description.p: Step into the shoes of a magical apprentice and learn to brew, mix, and transmute emojis.
The ultimate gothic alchemy puzzle game combining swipe-to-merge and match-3 mechanics.

ul.li: Unique core loop: A brand new puzzle hybrid
Over 800+ animated emojis to unlock, transmute, and collect
Strategic gameplay: Manage the board carefully
100% Ad-Free: A pure, uninterrupted puzzle experience

screenshot.caption: Gameplay combining merge and match-3 mechanics.

description.p: Initial release with core gameplay mechanics.
